### My Interactive Munro Map

**Current Progress:** I have bagged **{{< var munro_count >}}** out of 282 Munros!

Here is a live look at my progress across the Scottish Highlands:

::: {.column-screen-inset}
```{=html}
<iframe 
  src="my_munros_map.html" 
  width="100%" 
  height="700px" 
  style="border:none; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
</iframe>
:::
